title: bmalo's Custom Vanilla Plus
description: Custom Modpack for server so things work perfectly
body:
For a minecraft server I run for a friend group. Currently targetting 1.20.6

Not required since can use Vanilla client to connect but there is some exclusive things this provides.

Based on the [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) modpack but I've added and removed quite a few mods. Feel free to add back any mod from it you think should be in this pack.

If anyone is curious the server runs a seperate modpack since I didn't want to include mods which people won't be directly using when playing multiplayer.
